description: The module compiles and is formatted, vetted, and free of build errors.
steps: Confirm the source tree formats cleanly.
goal_condition: Feature FEAT-001 is complete when ALL of the following are visible in this session's transcript: (1) `gofmt -l .` was executed and produced no output (an empty result line). (2) `go build ./...` was executed and exited 0. (3) `go vet ./...` was executed and exited 0. Each command's full output and exit code must be visible in this transcript. (4) Append a line to progress.jsonl of the form {"feature_id":"FEAT-001","status":"pass","timestamp":"<ISO8601>"} and `cat progress.jsonl | tail -1` must show that line in the transcript. (5) Append an entry to RFL_JOURNAL.md following the success-entry schema, then run `tail -40 RFL_JOURNAL.md` so the entry is visible in the transcript. Stop after 15 turns if not complete and report what is blocking.
